prepay_structures: Fixed percentage of no less than 3%
Declining structures that do not exceed 5% and do not drop below 3% in the first 3 years
prepay_restrictions: Not allowed in AK, KS, MI, MN, NM, RI
Not allowed on loans vested to individuals in IL and NJ
Not allowed on loan amounts less than $319,777 in PA
On 1-2 unit properties cannot exceed 1% of the loan balance during the 1st five years in OH
general.max_cash_in_hand_note: Total equity withdrawn cannot exceed these limits. Not applicable to Delayed Financing transactions.
general.escrows: Escrows may be waived, see Section 2.4.5

dscr_lt_1.note: Sub-1 DSCR: 5% LTV reduction from >= 1.00 grid, 80% max LTV, 70% max LTV Cash-Out

income_doc.dscr_calc: Monthly Gross Rents divided by PITIA (or ITIA) of the subject property
income_doc.dscr_cashout_80_requires: DSCR must be above 1% (1.00) to do cash out at 80% LTV; if below, 5% LTV hit
income_doc.sub1_ltv_adjustment: 5% reduction, 80% max LTV, 70% max LTV Cash-Out

long_term_rental_purchase.rent_source: FNMA Form 1007 or 1025 reflecting long-term market rents
long_term_rental_purchase.tenant_occupied: 1007 or 1025 must reflect the current monthly rent
long_term_rental_purchase.rent_evaluation: Monthly gross rent evaluated for each unit individually
long_term_rental_purchase.lower_of_lease_or_market: If using the lower of actual lease amount or estimated market rent, nothing further required
long_term_rental_purchase.higher_actual_lease: Evidence of 2-months receipt required; lease amount must be within 120% of estimated market rent from 1007/1025; capped at 120% if exceeds
long_term_rental_purchase.higher_market_rent: Must be within 120% of lease amount; capped at 120% if exceeds
long_term_rental_purchase.rent_control: Must utilize current contractual rent to calculate DSCR

required_docs: FNMA Form 1007 or 1025 reflecting long-term market rents
long_term_rental_refinance.no_lease_ltv_limit: Lesser of 70% or per DSCR/FICO/Loan balance matrix
long_term_rental_refinance.vacant_property_ltv: Lesser of 70% or per DSCR/FICO/Loan balance matrix
long_term_rental_refinance.rent_evaluation: Monthly gross rent evaluated for each unit individually
long_term_rental_refinance.higher_actual_lease: Evidence of 2-months receipt required; within 120% of estimated market rent; capped at 120%
long_term_rental_refinance.higher_market_rent: Must be within 120% of lease amount; capped at 120%
long_term_rental_refinance.rent_control: Must utilize current contractual rent to calculate DSCR

str.expense_factor_note: Gross rents reduced by 20% to reflect extraordinary costs (advertising, furnishings, cleaning). If actual expenses < 20%, minimum 20% used. If actual expenses > 20%, actual expense factor used.
str.multiple_sources_note: When STR income documented using multiple sources, lowest source of monthly income used for DSCR

details: Must include source of data used
Include comparable STR properties focusing on room count, GLA, location, market appeal
Include daily rental rate and occupancy percentage
Factor seasonality and vacancy into the analysis
Must be completed by a licensed appraiser

proof_requirements.method: 12-month rental history statement from 3rd party rental/management service
details: Statement must identify the subject property/unit
Qualifying income must be net of all vendor or management fees
Borrower/guarantor must provide rental records for subject property to support monthly deposits

proof_requirements.method: AIRDNA Rentalizer / Property Earning Potential Report
details: Gross rents = revenue projection less 20% extraordinary expense factor
Forecast period must cover 12 months and dated within 90 days of Note date
Maximum occupancy limited to 2 individuals per bedroom
Must have 3 comparable properties similar in size, room count, amenities, availability, occupancy
Market Score or Sub-Market Score must be 60 or greater

refinance_seasoning.rate_term_0_to_6_months: Lesser of Purchase Price + Improvements or Appraised Value
refinance_seasoning.cash_out_0_to_6_months: Lesser of Purchase Price + Improvements or Appraised Value
refinance_seasoning.rtl_renovation_cash_out: If purchased & renovated per appraisal with SSR of 2.5 and below, can use appraised value under 6 months ownership

housing_history.0x60x12: Max 70% LTV Purchase, Max 65% LTV Rate/Term & Cash-Out

bk_fc_ss_dil_prefc_mc.gte_24_months: Max 75% LTV Purchase, Max 70% LTV Rate/Term & Cash-Out

investor_experience.experienced_investor: Borrower/guarantor must have history of owning and managing commercial or non-owner occupied residential real estate for at least 1 year in last 3 years

restrictions: >= 36 months seasoning from any credit event

unleased_properties.long_term_rental: Vacant or unleased property allowed subject to max LTV of 70%

underwriting.credit_score_method: Representative credit score of the borrower/guarantor with the highest representative score

tradelines.min: 2 reporting 24-months with activity in last 12 months, or 3 reporting 12-months with recent activity
tradelines.waiver: If borrower/guarantor has 3 credit scores, minimum tradeline requirement is waived

underwriting.reserves_cashout_note: Cash out may be used to satisfy requirement

mixed_use_commercial_limits.commercial_space_max: Must not exceed 49.99% of total building area

prepay_structures: Fixed percentage of no less than 3%
prepay_restrictions: Not allowed in AK, MS, MI, OH, MN, NM, RI
Not allowed on loans vested to individuals in IL and NJ
Not allowed on loan amounts less than $319,777 in PA
general.escrows: Escrows may be waived, see Section 2.4.5
general.ofac_restriction: Citizens and individuals from OFAC sanctioned countries are not eligible

income_doc.dscr_calc: Eligible monthly rents / PITIA (loans with IO feature may use ITIA payment). Reduce qualifying rents by any management fee reflected on appraisal report.
income_doc.leased_income: Use lower of estimated market rent or lease agreement
income_doc.management_fee: Reduce qualifying rents by any management fee on appraisal report
income_doc.mixed_use_commercial_income_limit: Income from commercial space must not exceed 49.99% of total property income

declining_market: Maximum eligible LTVs do not require a market adjustment for the 5-8 multifamily and 2-8 mixed use property types

investor_experience.experienced_investor: Borrower/guarantor must have history of owning and managing commercial or non-owner occupied residential real estate for at least 1 year in last 3 years

underwriting.credit_score_method: Representative credit score of the borrower/guarantor with the highest representative score

tradelines.min: 2 reporting 24-months with activity in last 12 months, or 3 reporting 12-months with recent activity
tradelines.waiver: For each borrower/guarantor who has 3 credit scores, minimum tradeline requirement is waived (all borrowers/guarantors must be evaluated individually)

underwriting.reserves_cashout_note: Cash out may NOT be used to satisfy requirement

5_8_residential: Narrative report can be utilized but not required
appraisals.2_8_mixed_use: General Purpose Commercial Forms (e.g., GP Commercial Summary Form from CoreLogic a la mode)
required_attachments: Photos of subject including exterior/interior and street scene
Sketch or floor plan of typical units
Review Product: Commercial BPO or second appraisal
In PA and NC: commercial evaluation product instead of commercial BPO

property_condition: No environmental issues (storage or use of hazardous material, e.g., Dry Cleaners, Laundromat)
No health or safety issues (as noted by appraiser, e.g., broken windows, stairs)
No excessive deferred maintenance that could become health or safety issue
No structural deferred maintenance (foundation, roof, electrical, plumbing)

program: Prime Time - Standard Doc and Alt Doc

general.prepay_options: Up to 5-Year prepayment periods eligible - Investment Only
prepay_restrictions: Not allowed in AK, KS, MI, MN, NM, RI
Not allowed on loans vested to individuals in IL and NJ
Not allowed on loan amounts less than $319,777 in PA
On 1-2 unit properties cannot exceed 1% of the loan balance during the 1st five years in OH

escrows.hpml: HPML loans require escrows for property taxes, hazard insurance, and flood insurance if applicable
escrows.non_hpml: See waiver options in Section 2.4.5 for non-HPML and Business Purpose loans

fico_660.note: Not eligible for P&L/Written VOE/Asset Utilization

fico_640.note: Not eligible for P&L/Written VOE/Asset Utilization

fico_620.note: Not eligible for P&L/Written VOE/Asset Utilization

fico_660.note: Not eligible for P&L/Written VOE/Asset Utilization

fico_640.note: Not eligible for P&L/Written VOE/Asset Utilization

fico_620.note: Not eligible for P&L/Written VOE/Asset Utilization

standard_doc.wage_salary: Paystubs, W-2s, 1-year or 2-years Tax Returns, IRS Form 4506-C, Verbal VOE
standard_doc.self_employed: 1-year or 2-years Personal and Business Tax Returns, YTD P&L, IRS Form 4506-C

aus_findings.also_allowed: DU Approve/Ineligible or LPA Accept/Ineligible for: loan amount, IO, prepay penalty, number of financed properties, credit score < 720 when borrower has 7 financed properties, refinances exceeding 75% LTV subject to Verus program max

personal_bank_statements.term: 12 or 24 months personal + 2 months business bank statements
personal_bank_statements.qualifying_income: Total eligible deposits from 12- or 24-months personal statements divided by number of statements
personal_bank_statements.business_requirement: Business bank statements must reflect business activity and transfers to personal account

analysis_methods: Expense ratio provided by 3rd party (CPA, EA, or tax preparer) min ratio 10%
3rd party prepared Profit & Loss Statement (CPA, EA, or tax preparer)

profit_and_loss_only.term: 12 or 24 months CPA/EA/CTEC/Tax Attorney prepared P&L Statement
profit_and_loss_only.attestation: CPA/EA/CTEC/Tax Attorney must attest they have completed or filed the borrower's most recent business tax return

written_voe.requirements: Two most recent months personal bank statements reflecting deposits from employer on each statement

irs_form_1099.ytd_doc: YTD documentation to support continued receipt of income from same source

asset_utilization.calculation: Eligible assets divided by 84 to determine monthly income stream

str.note: Not explicitly addressed in this program

underwriting.credit_score_method: Representative credit score of the borrower with the highest qualifying income

tradelines.min: 2 reporting 24-months with activity in last 12 months, or 3 reporting 12-months with recent activity
tradelines.waiver: If primary borrower has 3 credit scores, minimum tradeline requirement is waived

underwriting.assets: Min 30-days asset verification required; any large deposit must be sourced
underwriting.reserves_cashout_note: Cash out may be used to satisfy requirement

program: Closed End Second - Standard and Alt Doc

ineligible_features: Unseasoned cash-out (existing lien is cash-out within 6 months note date to note date)
Frequent refinances (2+ cash-out refis in past 12 months)
All existing subordinate liens must be satisfied except solar panels per Verus Seller Guide
All Solar Panel loans/leases with PACE/HERO financing must be paid off

standard_doc.wage_salary: Paystubs, 1-year or 2-years W-2s, IRS Form 4506-C, Verbal VOE
standard_doc.self_employed: 1-year or 2-years Personal and Business (if applicable) Tax Returns, YTD P&L, IRS Form 4506-C

desktop_underwriter_lpa.ineligible: Ineligible, Caution, or Refer with Caution not allowed

personal_bank_statements.term: 12 or 24 months personal + 2 months business bank statements
personal_bank_statements.qualifying_income: Total eligible deposits from 12- or 24-months personal statements divided by number of statements
personal_bank_statements.business_requirement: Business bank statements must reflect business activity and transfers to personal account

analysis_methods: Expense ratio provided by 3rd party (CPA, EA, or tax preparer) min ratio 10%
3rd party prepared Profit & Loss Statement (CPA, EA, or tax preparer)

irs_form_1099.ytd_doc: YTD documentation to support continued receipt of income

written_voe.requirements: Two most recent months personal bank statements reflecting deposits from employer on each statement

declining_market.note: Limited to 80% for all transactions if appraisal identifies declining market

required_docs: Copy of most recent monthly mortgage payment statement
first_lien_requirements.io_arm_review: Terms of the Note to be reviewed for DTI
ineligible_first_liens: Forbearance, modifications, or deferrals completed or reinstated within 12 months of Note date
Loans in active forbearance or deferment
Negative amortization including loans with PIK features
Balloon if balloon payment due during amortization period of new 2nd lien
Loans secured by more than one property (cross-collateralized or blanket mortgages)
Note with default interest rate greater than Note rate

underwriting.credit_score_method: Representative credit score of the borrower with the highest qualifying income

tradelines.min: 2 reporting 24-months with activity in last 12 months, or 3 reporting 12-months with recent activity
tradelines.waiver: If primary borrower has 3 credit scores, minimum tradeline requirement is waived

underwriting.assets: Asset verification required if funds needed to consummate the transaction

required: Copy of most recent monthly mortgage payment statement

qualifying_payment_first_lien.stand_alone: Utilize senior lien mortgage payment from credit report

qualifying_rate.fixed: Note rate amortized over total term
qualifying_rate.arms: Higher of fully indexed rate or note rate
qualifying_rate.io_fixed_arm: Qualifying rate amortized over remaining term after IO period expiration

underwriting.recently_listed: Properties currently listed or listed within past 6 months not eligible

appraisal_requirements.hpml_non_qm: Full appraisal with interior inspection required regardless of loan balance

options: AVM from approved vendor with acceptable FSD score + Property Condition Report
Exterior Drive-By appraisal (Hybrid, 2055, or 1075) - only 1-unit with or without ADU
Prior 1st lien appraisal within 12 months of Note date (same lender, with PCR and recertification by original appraiser)
BPO from: Clear Capital, Consolidated Analytics, Computershare, or Stewart Valuation Intelligence
Prior 1st lien appraisal within 12 months of Note date (same lender, with PCR, recertification by original appraiser, and AVM with acceptable FSD score)
primary_valuation_gt_250000.prior_appraisal_value: Lower of prior appraisal value or current AVM used to determine CLTV

options.if_exceeds: Enhanced desk review, field review, or second appraisal required

products: ARR from Stewart Valuation Intelligence (FKA Pro Teck)
Valreview Appraisal Review Value from Valligent (Veros Software Company)
options.10_pct_variance: If value > 10% below appraised or cannot validate, field review or second appraisal required

options.note: If primary valuation is AVM, review must be from different vendor
options.dual_avm_rule: Higher FSD score (closest to zero) = primary; second must support within 10%

options.dual_bpo_rule: Lowest value BPO = primary; must be completed by different brokers

appraisal_requirements.property_condition_report: Exterior photo of subject with rating of physical condition and characteristics

loan_lte_250000: Owner and Encumbrance Report (O&E) including: current grantee/owner, conveyance method, liens (mortgage, UCC, other), involuntary liens/judgements, property tax info with special assessments, legal description
ALTA Short Form Residential Limited Coverage Junior Loan Policy
loan_gt_250000: ALTA Short Form Residential Limited Coverage Junior Loan Policy

flood.insurance: Required for properties in flood zone per HFIAA
flood.loss_payee: Must reflect seller as additional insured
